views.description: Render a 19x19 Go board with star points, stones, last move marker, legal move shading, and optional engine heat. Clicking an empty legal intersection triggers play_move with point from record:point.
Engine opinion after the last move. The host may show it as a side panel.
Engine black winrate as a progress bar.
views.label: Black winrate

views.description: Move list. Selecting a row reviews history without changing the game.
Game-level actions. Resign is destructive for a rated match; pass changes game state.

actions.label: Play
actions.description: Submits a move to the computer opponent or server-authoritative match loop.

actions.label: Hint
actions.description: Asks the engine for a hint; may spend compute budget.

actions.label: Undo
actions.description: Requests an undo in local analysis mode.

actions.label: Resign
actions.description: Ends the game as a loss. In rated mode this is irreversible.

actions.label: New Game
actions.description: Starts over and discards the current local game.

surface.title: Human vs Computer Go
surface.description: Graphical Go operation surface for a human playing against a computer engine. The board is an open semantic kind rendered by a preinstalled host capability or by safe fallback; the action and point binding remain deterministic.

engine.comment: Black is slightly ahead if the center influence is converted.

coach_messages.message: Engine suggests expanding on the right side.
Do not answer locally at J11 unless reading supports the cut.
